llm_unified_plan.aggregation_instruction: Aggregate t1 for total ingestion record counts (sum of ROWCOUNT or count of records) over the last 90 days from local snapshot. Aggregate t2 and t3 for batch and dataflow run success counts from live API. Combine results to present ingestion record counts and batch success counts for the last 90 days. Note: The live API endpoints may not directly provide a 'success count' filter; the backend will return counts which may need post-processing for success status if not directly filterable.
